The Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Galaxy (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $51,019,112Details
International Box Office $51,727,102
Worldwide Box Office $102,746,214
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,103,203 (41.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,133 opening theaters/3,133 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $95,193,228

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 29th, 2005 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: April 29th, 2005 (Wide), released as The Hitchhiker's Guide To The Galaxy (Australia)
Video Release: September 13th, 2005 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements, action and mild language.
Running Time: 109 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Geographical setting: Outer Space
Plot point: Alien Encounters, Friendly Alien on Earth, Government Bureaucracy, Hitchhiker, Surprise Twist, Writing and Writers
Social setting: End of the World
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
